meaning: adj.[化](分子中含有)三(个)羧基的
examples: The current topical areas focus on the rigid aromatic multicarboxylate ligands, such as benzene dicarboxylic acid and benzene tricarboxylic acid.
Aconitase 2 (ACO2) catalyzes the conversion of citrate to isocitrate via cis-aconitate in the second step of the tricarboxylic acid (TCA) cycle (1, 2).
Bifunctional organic ligand 2, 4, 6-pyridine tricarboxylic acid, water-soluble rare-earth fluorescence labeling material and preparation method thereof.
